code: import React from"react";import{getScoreColor}from"./ScoreRing";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function SeverityBadge(_ref){let{severity}=_ref;const config={high:{bg:"bg-red-500/10",text:"text-red-400",border:"border-red-500/30"},medium:{bg:"bg-amber-500/10",text:"text-amber-400",border:"border-amber-500/30"},low:{bg:"bg-blue-500/10",text:"text-blue-400",border:"border-blue-500/30"}};const c=config[severity]||config.low;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] font-mono font-bold uppercase tracking-wider ".concat(c.bg," ").concat(c.text," border ").concat(c.border),"data-testid":"severity-".concat(severity),children:severity});}export function ImpactBadge(_ref2){let{impact}=_ref2;const config={positive:{bg:"bg-emerald-500/10",text:"text-emerald-400",border:"border-emerald-500/30",label:"Positive"},negative:{bg:"bg-red-500/10",text:"text-red-400",border:"border-red-500/30",label:"Negative"},neutral:{bg:"bg-zinc-500/10",text:"text-zinc-400",border:"border-zinc-500/30",label:"Neutral"}};const c=config[impact]||config.neutral;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] font-mono font-bold uppercase tracking-wider ".concat(c.bg," ").concat(c.text," border ").concat(c.border),"data-testid":"impact-".concat(impact),children:c.label});}
